_evasion.description: Attacker uses direct or indirect syscalls (not Win32 API) to perform injection. Sysmon still captures the resulting EID 8 (CreateRemoteThread) event regardless of API layer used.
_evasion.bypass_attempt: Bypassing userland API hooks by calling syscalls directly
_evasion.notes: Direct syscall injection still generates Sysmon EID 8 because Sysmon hooks at the kernel driver level, not at the Win32 API layer. Our rule remains effective.
